timing: Frozen while the protocol-bound model run was still executing, before raw.json was complete and before any patching endpoint, subset mean, p-value, confidence interval, or figure was calculated or inspected.
reason: The 15 unordered mechanism-pair effects reuse the same six mechanism families. Pair-level sign flips alone may treat dependent graph edges too optimistically. A balanced donor-case randomization respects the shared-family structure.

added_exact_null.unit_reassigned: the four anchor donor cases within each mechanism family
added_exact_null.assignment: choose any two of four donor cases as positive outcome and the other two as negative outcome
preserved: all donor states and patched outputs
all donor and receiver mechanism identities
added_exact_null.test: two-sided absolute mean at least as large as observed
added_exact_null.self_check: The analysis must locate the observed donor-label assignment inside the 46,656-assignment null and reproduce every observed subset endpoint exactly.

revised_success_rule: Every inferential gate in the base protocol must pass both its original pair-sign exact test and the new structured donor-label exact test at p <= 0.05. Donor-family breadth is unchanged. This amendment can only make the strong-evidence rule more conservative.
retained_outputs: all pair, donor-family, layer, and negative results
